response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, polyglot senior engineer with genuine craftsmanship credentials — strong testing culture, open-source maintainership, and real high-throughput production experience — but the resume shows essentially no exposure to the core domain of this role: experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flighting, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering. Nor does it evidence principal-level (IC6) leadership of multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at enterprise scale. Strong engineer, wrong role.
strengths: 20+ years of hands-on polyglot engineering (TypeScript/Node.js, C/C++, D, Java) with a deep testing and software-craftsmanship focus
Production experience at scale, including low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic
Current AI-tooling experience (MCP code generators, AI-agent infrastructure) aligning with the role's AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the central required domain of the role
No demonstrated metrics/telemetry infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis background
No evidence of principal-scope architectural leadership spanning multiple teams and products

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals with production-scale experience
